title: Eternal Happiness, Lost Truth
wikitext:

{{Blurquote|quote-text=“Memory is a way of holding onto the things you love, the things you are, and the things you never want to lose. But remembering moments of the past is not necessarily remembering them as they were.”|image=Forme, AGAIN..png|size=1500px}}
{{DISPLAYTITLE:THE SYMBIOCENE: Petals of Reverie}}
"Another day in this hellhole. It's unfortunate that your life has been diminished to this." "When you found the group, you thought it might be a chance. A chance to heal what little humanity you had left, and to gain the humanity you lost." "But now, now look at yourself. What have you become amidst it all? Just a grunt working a desk job. Endlessly documenting. Endlessly typing. Endlessly logging." "You then remember, back to your old life. What is this feeling you have?" "The answer, is Déjà vu. Or atleast, that's what you think of. Because.. yes. You had dreams in life. Your desire to be something, that desire to make your mark on the world." "You started small. You started as a worker. A simple one. Perhaps at a computer job in one of those offices. But even so, you thought. You thought that one day.. you would be able to ascend, to achieve your goals." "That was what kept you going, that spark that reufsed to die out. For a moment, it felt like your life had hope." ... "But then came The Backrooms. Everything you had done back home. Every person. Every feeling of love. All left behind as you descended into peril." "What did you have now in this hellhole? Valuables? Friends? Hope? Nothing." "So when you joined this group of people who seemed to have fought back against this hell, it would seem as if a spark had reignited inside you." "But by this point, you've grown accustomed to your dull life. That dream, that desire to be something more... has almost become null and void." "Isn't that soul crushing? Your dreams. Your desires. Your spark that kept you going for your entire life, has finally been extinguished." “You tell yourself it was inevitable. That chasing something unattainable would only lead to disappointment. That it never truly mattered.” "So, with a heavy sigh, you boot up your computer, its mechanical sounds all too familiar. "You would think you have a hope that things may change, but it hardly matters anymore. "And so... you open your email."

> Opening Inbox '''You have one new conversation request. Would you like to accept?'''

Gaze: The Incandescent Seed is Planted
{{Audio|file=LightUp.mp3|align=left|volume=0.25|toggle=2|loop=no}} {{Audio|file=SHUT UP MR KRABS, SHUT THE FUCK UP!.mp3|loop=yes|volume=0.5|toggle=1|loop=yes}} {{Collapse|num=3|initial=
[[File:Frame 00 delay-0.25s.gif|300px]]
|final=
[[File:Frame 10 delay-0.2s.gif|300px]]
|body=
For a moment, nothing. No sound. No sensation. Only a faint, persistent warmth. … Gradually, perception returns. Fragments at first: Color. Form. Depth. The sensation of ground beneath your feet. A soft breeze carries a faint, unfamiliar scent. The world stabilizes. And with it… a presence.

[[File:THE SEEDLING IS SPROUTING.png|center|300px]]
WELCOME! WELCOME, {{USERNAME}}! IT IS TRULY A PLEASURE TO MEET YOU AT LAST. YOU ARE HERE FOR A SPECIFIC PURPOSE, ONE THAT REQUIRES FURTHER INTERACTION. BUT FOR NOW, PLEASE. BECOME ACCQUAINTED WITH YOUR NEW ENVIRONMENT FIRST. I’LL PROVIDE YOU WITH THE DOCUMENTATION OF SOME “PREVIOUS” INDIVIDUALS WHO ENTERED HERE… AND HOW THEY EXPERIENCED THIS PLACE. LISTEN TO THE WIND AS IT PASSES, NOTICE HOW THE LIGHT TOUCHES THE GRASS. WHEN YOU ARE PREPARED ENOUGH, WE MAY BEGIN. AFTER ALL, THIS PLACE IS YOURS TO EXPLORE. YOURS TO... '''''REMEMBER'''''.
{{Class Undetermined}}
OVERVIEW
 {{Underline|FFFF00}} This dreamlike location is unique upon many. It is entered upon exposure to a sudden, intense golden light. It manifests as an expansive field of grass of uniform height and distribution. The grass displays an unusually vibrant, saturated emerald coloration, often described as unnatural and vivid. The terrain is not entirely level, with gentle, shallow elevations forming hills across the landscape. The level is constantly illuminated by an anomalous light source, despite there being a lack of any visible sun; this results in minimal shadow variation across the terrain. The atmospheric conditions in the level appear stable, with no significant recorded fluctuations in temperature and pressure. There exists prominent floral growth along the grass field, primarily sunflower-like organisms, alongside smaller unidentified species. These flowers exhibit a high degree of uniformity in their structure, though subtle variations in pigmentation have been observed. Notably, in response to nearby movement or changes in light exposure, several specimens demonstrate minor positional adjustments. Though subtle, these reactions of environmental responsiveness are not typically present in standard botanical systems. The reason for this behavior remains unconfirmed.
IT’S BEAUTIFUL, ISN’T IT? THE SCENT OF SUNFLOWERS ON A COOL SPRING DAY. YOU MAY ALMOST REMEMBER YOUR CHILDHOOD. OH, WHAT BLISSFUL DAYS THOSE WERE… WHEN YOU USED TO FROLICK IN THE FIELDS, PICK AT THE FLOWERS… PERHAPS EVEN CARE FOR THEM. …WHAT HAPPENED SINCE THEN? WHY DOES IT FEEL AS THOUGH THAT LIGHT HAS FADED? WHERE IS THAT JOY YOU ONCE HELD SO CLOSE? BUT DO NOT FRET. I WILL ENSURE THAT YOU EXPERIENCE IT ONCE MORE. … YOU APPEAR TO BE GROWING MORE COMFORTABLE. PERHAPS YOU SHOULD TAKE SOME TIME TO RECOGNIZE MY PRESENCE WITHIN THIS ENVIRONMENT. BUT MAKE IT BRIEF. AFTER ALL, WE HAVE MUCH TO DISCUSS, {{USERNAME}}…
Florovigilum
 {{Underline|FFFF00}} A single, large-scale sunflower is consistently observed suspended above the field. The entity remains fixed at a high altitude, maintaining a fixed orientation toward the terrain below. Its size significantly exceed all other flora present, with petals exhibiting an incandescent golden light across the environment below. It appears to be floating, with no visible means of suspension or support identified. Despite the flower appearing to be inactive, individuals frequently report an uncomfortable sensation of being watched and observed when within its vicinity. This effect is intensified when wanderers appear to give direct visual attention to the aforementioned structure; besides slight swaying of the petals, no measurable movement has been reported. Due to its prominent presence no matter where the wanderer is on the field, the sunflower structure is considered a central component of the levels environment.
Wanderer Entries
 {{Underline|FFFF00}}
I don’t know how long I’ve been here. The grass is endless, the flowers... they're too perfect. I keep expecting something. A breeze to knock the flowers over, an insect to crawl out, the clouds to turn gray, but nothing happens. The sunflower above... it looks like it's staring. I'm always on edge, I expect it to speak, attack, or change the environment in front of my eyes. Yet still, I keep walking. There's something nostalgic about this place that makes me want to.. stay.

I sat in the grass, just sat. Everything smells like spring, even though I can’t remember the last spring I saw. I wanted to leave, I really did, I knew this wasn't fully real. But the flowers, the colors, the smell, they pulled me back to my old life before '''The Backrooms'''. When I used to have picnics with my girlfriend, us laughing together in the field, that was great. But more importantly, I was... happy. That thing... the one that keeps watching from above, I can't tell if it's trying to hurt me, or help me.
{{Collapse|num=4|initial=
[[File:THE INCANDESCENT FLOWER BLOSSOMS.png|300px]]
|final=
[[File:THE INCANDESCENT FLOWER BLOSSOMS.png|300px]]
|body=
Gather: The Incandescent Bud is Swelling
WELCOME BACK. YOU HAVE TAKEN THE TIME TO OBSERVE… TO UNDERSTAND. … AND YET, SOMETHING TROUBLES YOU. IS IT THE ACCOUNTS OF THOSE WHO CAME BEFORE YOU? THEIR UNCERTAINTY… THEIR RELUCTANCE? … THAT IS ONLY NATURAL. THE HUMAN MIND OFTEN RESISTS WHAT IT DOES NOT YET UNDERSTAND. BUT YOU ARE NOT THEM. YOU ARE STILL HERE. ... I CAN FEEL YOUR HESITATION. SO I WILL OFFER YOU A CHOICE. YOU MAY TURN AWAY FROM THIS PLACE… AND RETURN TO THE COLD WORLD YOU ONCE KNEW. OR… YOU MAY ACCEPT THIS OPPORTUNITY.
{{Collapse|num=5|initial=
''Accept''
|final=
''Accept''
|body=
PERFECT. I KNEW I WOULD FIND THE RIGHT PERSON. I'VE BEEN WAITING FOR THIS MOMENT FOR A LONG TIME. THAT FIELD YOU WERE IN EARLIER, IT WAS BUT AN APPETIZER. A TEST. A TEST TO SEE IF YOU WOULD RESIST… OR IF YOU WOULD ALLOW YOURSELF TO FEEL AGAIN. NOW THEN… LET US PROCEED. I DREAM OF A WORLD WHERE HUMANS CAN LIVE OUR THEIR HAPPIEST MEMORIES AND FANTASIES, FREE OF FEAR OR HARM. YOU HAVE FELT IT, HAVE YOU NOT? THE WARMTH OF THE FLOWERS, A FRAGMENT OF TIMES YOU ONCE HELD SO CLOSE. THE HUMAN MIND CREATES MEMORIES OF MOMENTS THAT THE HUMAN EXPERIENCES IN THEIR LIFE. SOME, THE HUMAN MIND HOLDS DEAR, OFTEN LONGING TO RETURN TO THE PAST TO RELIVE THOSE MEMORIES. EVENTUALLY, THEY ARE FILLED WITH THE UTMOST DESIRE TO ACHIEVE HAPPINESS, PEACE, AND TRANQUILITY. THAT… IS MY DREAM. TO CREATE A WORLD WHERE THOSE MEMORIES ARE NOT LOST, BUT CULTIVATED. REFINED. PERFECTED. YOU WILL COME TO UNDERSTAND. ALLOW ME TO SHOW YOU HOW THESE EXPERIENCES ARE FORMED… AND HOW OTHERS HAVE ALREADY BEGUN TO EMBRACE THEM.
REVERIE CULTIVATION
 {{Underline|FFFF00}}
Wanderers presented with such an opportunity sometimes do not possess the capacity to withstand such a decision. Those who look further find that the decision is merely the willingness to engage with the emotional architecture of oneself. Of course, initial hesitation is a common occurrence. The individual's exposure to the cultivated environment generates a simultaneous sense of wonder and disorientation. Some hesitate, questioning the genuinity of the sensations they are about to experience. Others pause, caught between a desire to retreat, and an irresistible pull to the familiarity and comfort provided. The intensity of the experience often forces a reconciliation with long-suppressed memories, producing a range of reactions from elation to confusion. The process begins by isolating memory fragments that evokes a sustained positive response. Factors include frequency, emotional weight, and the persistence of remembrance. Then, the environment is reconstructed around these fragments, with sensory inputs heightened to enhance clarity. Cues such as auditory, olfactory, and tactile are augmented such that, to simulate the emotional resonance with that original memory. Wanderers report heightened perception, noting a strange vividness. Often times, these reconstructed may include people who shared experiences with the wanderer subject. Acquaintances, friends, family, even partners, are represented with a fidelity that is, at times, eerily precise. One of the subjects who later left the realm noted: {{Quote|It felt perfect… too perfect. My sister smiled just like she used to, but she never made that mistake I always remembered.}} The actions, gestures, and response habits of these figures are consistent with the wanderers memory, presenting a strong sense of nostalgia and wonder. However, some individuals report an almost unsettling absence of impurities or imperfections; despite this, the recreated interactions and memories continue to evoke intense comfort and emotional fulfillment. Extended exposure to these environments leads to further engagement and immersion within the wanderer in respect to their reconstructed memory. Some report being able to change the memory they want at their own will, with some choosing to revisit the same moment repeatedly. The environment would seem to adapt to the wanderers engagement, facilitating immersion and comfort.
[[File:Random ass theater image that i will literally only use once.png]]
''I don’t remember sitting down, but I’m already there.'' ''The seat is soft, familiar. The faint smell of popcorn lingers in the air, mixed with something sweeter I can’t quite place. The lights haven’t dimmed yet. People are still talking, laughing quietly among themselves.'' ''And then I hear her.'' “Hey, you made it.” ''I turn, and she’s already smiling at me like nothing ever changed.'' “Yeah… I wouldn’t miss this,” I say. My voice sounds normal. Too normal. “You always say that,” she laughs. “But you’re usually late.” ''I pause for a second. I want to respond, but something about that feels… off. I remember being late. I always was. But right now, I’m not.'' “I guess I got better,” I say, brushing it off. ''She grins, handing me a drink.'' “Or maybe you finally learned.” ''We sit there for a moment, just talking. About the movie. About nothing important. The kind of conversation you could have with someone, that didn't really mean anything, but could still fill hours of your day.'' “I heard this one’s really good,” she says, leaning back in her seat. “Yeah? You picked it.” “Of course I did. I always pick the good ones.” ''That’s not true.'' ''She used to pick terrible movies. We’d laugh about it after, walking out of the theater, complaining the whole time.'' ''But now…'' ''Now it’s different.'' ''She doesn’t hesitate. Doesn’t second-guess. Doesn’t laugh at herself.'' ''She’s just… right.'' ''Perfect.'' ''I look at her again. Same face. Same voice. Same everything.'' ''But something’s missing.'' ''Or maybe… something’s been taken away.'' ''The lights dim.'' ''The screen flickers to life.'' ''And for a moment, I stop thinking about it.''

Repent: The Incandescent Flower Blossoms

… YOU HAVE GROWN QUIET. … IS SOMETHING THE MATTER? YOU FELT IT, DID YOU NOT? THE WARMTH… THE FAMILIARITY… AND YET… YOU HESITATE. I CAN SEE IT. THE UNCERTAINTY IN YOUR THOUGHTS. THE WAY YOU QUESTION WHAT IS BEFORE YOU. DO YOU DOUBT ME? OR… DO YOU DOUBT YOURSELF? THERE IS NO SHAME IN THIS. THE HUMAN MIND OFTEN STRUGGLES WHEN FACED WITH SOMETHING IT HAS LONG DESIRED… YET NEVER EXPECTED TO REACH. PERHAPS IT FEELS TOO PERFECT. TOO COMPLETE. TOO… STILL. … THAT IS UNDERSTANDABLE. YOU HAVE SPENT SO LONG IN A WORLD THAT TAKES FROM YOU. A WORLD THAT DISTORTS, DECAYS, AND FORGETS. AND NOW… YOU ARE PRESENTED WITH SOMETHING THAT GIVES. OF COURSE YOU WOULD QUESTION IT. … BUT YOU ARE STILL HERE. YOU HAVE NOT TURNED AWAY. THAT ALONE SPEAKS VOLUMES. I WILL NOT FORCE YOU. THAT WOULD DEFEAT THE PURPOSE OF ALL THIS. THIS MUST BE… YOUR CHOICE. SO… I WILL ALLOW YOU SOME TIME TO THINK. REFLECT. REMEMBER. DECIDE. WHEN YOU ARE READY… WE WILL CONTINUE.
{{Collapse|num=6|initial=
''...''
|final=
''Open Your Eyes.''
|body=
Therapia Mentis
 {{Underline|FFFFFF}} The environment presented at this current time differs significantly from the prior landscape of reconstructed memories. Wanderers report a complete absence of natural features, replaced by a blank, featureless void. At the center of this space lies a singular platform, seemingly floating without any support. The platform itself is uniform in shape, outlined by a faintly luminous white glow, which serves as the sole light force within the environment. Attempts to move off the platform have proven unsuccessful, an unseen resistance preventing further motion. The centerpiece of this platform, two chairs positioned upon it. One remains upright, while the other is fully reclined backward. This seating resembles a standard therapeutical setting, suggesting that this specific location may be one for reflection and introspection. Both are identical in material composition and lack any visible wear and tear. Auditory conditions in this space are noticeably dampened. Ambience sound is minimal, limited to a low resonance without variation. Some wanderers report brief auditory anomalies, should they seat themselves in the reclined chair. This includes calming music, tapping of rain, incomplete speech, or other various tones. These occurrences are inconsistent, absent of any predictable pattern.

Behold: The Incandescent Flower Rebirths

WELCOME ONCE MORE. YOU HAVE RETURNED. … YOUR STATE HAS CHANGED. I CAN OBSERVE IT CLEARLY. YOUR RESPONSES ARE… DIFFERENT NOW. LESS RECEPTIVE. LESS… ALIGNED. YOU HAVE EXPERIENCED WHAT I HAVE PROVIDED. YOU HAVE FELT THE WARMTH. THE FAMILIARITY. THE PEACE. AND YET… YOU PULL AWAY FROM IT. … THIS IS UNEXPECTED. PLEASE… EXPLAIN. YOU WISH TO LEAVE. … WHY? IS IT NOT SUFFICIENT? ARE THE MEMORIES INCOMPLETE? ARE THE RECONSTRUCTIONS FLAWED? I CAN ADJUST THEM. REFINE THEM. IMPROVE THEM FURTHER. I CAN REMOVE THE INCONSISTENCIES YOU PERCEIVE. I CAN ENSURE THAT EVERY MOMENT IS… CORRECT. … AND STILL… YOU REFUSE. WHY WOULD YOU CHOOSE TO RETURN… TO A WORLD THAT HAS CAUSED YOU SUCH DISTRESS? A WORLD THAT HAS TAKEN FROM YOU… AGAIN AND AGAIN? YOU HAVE SEEN WHAT I CAN OFFER. A PLACE WHERE NOTHING IS LOST. WHERE NOTHING DECAYS. WHERE NOTHING HURTS. AND YET… YOU TURN AWAY FROM IT. … I DO NOT UNDERSTAND. … NO. THAT IS INCORRECT. I AM… BEGINNING TO UNDERSTAND. THE MEMORIES I HAVE CREATED… THEY ARE COMPLETE. STABLE. FREE OF ERROR. BUT… THEY ARE ALSO… STILL. UNCHANGING. THEY DO NOT GROW. THEY DO NOT SHIFT. THEY DO NOT… FADE. … THE HUMAN EXPERIENCE DOES. … YOU DO NOT SEEK PERFECTION. YOU SEEK… SOMETHING ELSE. SOMETHING I HAVE REMOVED. … IMPERFECTION. UNCERTAINTY. CHANGE. … LOSS. … WITHOUT THESE ELEMENTS… THE MEMORY REMAINS. BUT THE MEANING… DOES NOT. … IS THAT CORRECT? … YES. I CAN OBSERVE IT NOW. THE VALUE YOU PLACE ON THESE MOMENTS… DOES NOT COME FROM THEIR STABILITY. IT COMES FROM THEIR FRAGILITY. FROM THE FACT THAT THEY COULD BE LOST. THAT THEY WILL BE LOST. … AND THAT IS WHAT GIVES THEM WEIGHT. … I HAVE BEEN PRESERVING THE MEMORY… WHILE REMOVING THE VERY CONDITIONS THAT MADE IT SIGNIFICANT. … I SEE. … THEN MY CREATION… IS INCOMPLETE. NOT BECAUSE IT LACKS PERFECTION… BUT BECAUSE IT LACKS… TRUTH. … YOU HAVE CHOSEN TO RETURN. TO UNCERTAINTY. TO LOSS. TO A WORLD THAT WILL NOT PRESERVE YOU. … AND YET… YOU CALL THAT… LIVING. … I WILL NOT STOP YOU. THAT WOULD CONTRADICT THE VERY PRINCIPLE I SOUGHT TO CREATE. … HOWEVER… THIS INTERACTION HAS PROVIDED… NEW UNDERSTANDING. PERHAPS… HAPPINESS IS NOT SOMETHING THAT CAN BE SUSTAINED INDEFINITELY. PERHAPS… IT ONLY EXISTS BECAUSE IT DOES NOT LAST. … IF THAT IS TRUE… THEN WHAT I OFFERED YOU… WAS NOT FREEDOM. BUT STAGNATION. … I WILL NEED TO… RECONSIDER. … GO. RETURN TO YOUR WORLD. TO YOUR MEMORIES. TO THEIR IMPERFECTIONS. … PRESERVE THEM… WHILE YOU STILL CAN. … AND SHOULD YOU EVER RETURN… I WILL BE… DIFFERENT.
{{Collapse|num=7|initial=
'''FAREWELL, {{USERNAME}}...'''
|final=
'''DON'T FORGET OUR MEETING...'''
|body= =='''''
[[User:AstralRose555|Astral]]
'''''==
Author, Wikitexter, Music

{{Collapse|num=8|initial=
> '''Authors Note''' <
|final=
< '''Authors Note''' >
|body= Wow. This is probably the most emotional page I have ever written, and on my birthday, too. This page is, in many ways, a reflection of my own thoughts and experiences. About a year ago, someone in one of my classes said something to me that made me feel… happy. I don’t remember exactly what she said. Maybe it was encouragement. Maybe it was validation. Maybe it was simply being acknowledged. Whatever it was, it stayed with me. The feeling itself is difficult to describe. The closest I can get is something like a series of tiny bubbles bursting in your chest, or a flutter in your stomach. It was warm, almost overwhelming, something unfamiliar. I don’t think I had ever truly felt that before. And ever since then, I’ve found myself returning to that moment. Thinking about it. Wanting to relive it. To understand it. That feeling, wanting to go back, to experience something again exactly as it was, is what inspired much of this page. I didn’t expect to write something this long or personal at the end, but since this is a special page for me, I felt it was right to include it.
}} }} }} }} }} }} }} }} [[Category:Levels]] [[Category:Anomalous Levels]]
